app.name: 3D Portal
auth.error.invalid_credentials: Incorrect email or password. Try again.
agents.dialog.title: Agent Onboarding
agents.dialog.intro: Three commands to bring a fresh AI agent up to speed: fetch the runbook, fetch the OpenAPI surface, and point it at the credentials file.
agents.dialog.section_runbook.label: 1. Fetch the runbook
agents.dialog.section_openapi.label: 2. Fetch the OpenAPI surface
agents.dialog.section_credentials.label: 3. Credentials file (chmod 600)
auth.sessions.title: Active sessions
auth.sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account.
auth.sessions.logout_others: Log out from all other devices
auth.sessions.confirm_revoke_current: This will log you out of this device. Continue?
auth.2fa.title: Two-factor authentication
auth.2fa.status.enabled.title: 2FA is enabled
auth.2fa.reauth.error.invalid_credential: Incorrect password or code, try again
auth.2fa.reauth.error.rate_limited: Too many attempts, try again later
auth.2fa.enroll.title: Scan the QR code
auth.2fa.enroll.description: Use Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP-compatible app.
auth.2fa.enroll.cant_scan: Can't scan? Enter this secret manually
auth.2fa.enroll.code_label: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
auth.2fa.enroll.forced_banner: Your role requires two-factor authentication. Please complete enrollment below to continue.
auth.2fa.qr_alt: QR code containing your TOTP enrollment URI
auth.2fa.show_codes.title: Save your recovery codes
auth.2fa.show_codes.description: Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator app. Store them somewhere safe — they cannot be shown again.
auth.2fa.show_codes.saved_confirm: I have saved these recovery codes
auth.2fa.done.title: Two-factor authentication enabled
auth.2fa.done.description: Use your authenticator app on next sign-in.
auth.2fa.error.totp_not_configured: Two-factor authentication is temporarily unavailable. Try again later or contact an administrator.
auth.2fa.verify.title: Two-factor authentication
auth.2fa.verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your recovery codes.
auth.2fa.verify.error.session_expired: Session expired, please sign in again.
admin.tabs.invites_coming_soon: Coming in Story 8.6 — admin invite list + revoke UI
admin.users.title: Users
admin.users.description: All registered users. Sort by any header, filter by email, paginate. Per-user actions ship in the next story.
admin.users.error_loading: Could not load users. Refresh the page or check the API.
admin.users.change_role.title: Change role for {{email}}
admin.users.change_role.description: Pick a new role for this user. Promoting to admin grants full panel access. The agent role is system-managed and cannot be assigned from this panel.
admin.users.confirm.deactivate_descripti: The user will lose access on their next refresh (within 10 minutes) and cannot log in until reactivated. All their active sessions will be terminated.
admin.users.confirm.reactivate_descripti: The user will regain login access. Existing sessions remain invalidated; the user will need to log in again.
admin.users.confirm.force_logout_descrip: All active sessions for this user will be invalidated. They will need to log in again. Their access token remains valid until natural expiry (≤10 minutes).
admin.users.errors.cannot_target_self: You cannot apply this action to your own account.
admin.users.errors.cannot_target_agent: The agent service account is system-managed; this action is not allowed.
admin.users.errors.cannot_promote_to_age: The agent role is created by the bootstrap script, not from this panel.
admin.users.errors.user_not_found: User not found. The list may be out of date — refresh and try again.
admin.users.errors.generic: Action failed. Try again or check the API logs.
admin.users.confirm.force_2fa_enrollment: On their next login the user will be redirected to the 2FA enrollment screen and cannot use the portal until they complete enrollment. The flag clears automatically after a successful enrollment.
admin.users.confirm.force_disable_2fa_de: All active recovery codes will be invalidated and the user will be able to log in with only their password. Use only when the user has lost both their authenticator app and their recovery codes. Consider issuing a password reset for this user next.
admin.users.errors.totp_already_enrolled: The user already has 2FA enabled. The force-enrollment action only applies before initial enrollment.
admin.users.errors.already_force_enrolle: The user is already flagged for forced 2FA enrollment on their next login.
admin.users.errors.totp_not_enrolled: The user does not have 2FA enabled, so force-disable has no effect.
admin.users.confirm.issue_password_reset: A single-use reset link will be generated. The link must be delivered out-of-band to the user (SMS, Messenger, personal mail). The cleartext token is shown ONLY ONCE.
admin.users.reset_link.modal_body: This link will be valid until {{expires_at}}. Copy it now and deliver it out-of-band. If you close this modal without copying, you must issue a fresh one.
admin.invites.title: Invites
admin.invites.description: Manage portal invitations — generate new registration links, track status, revoke unused invites.
admin.invites.error_loading: Could not load invites. Refresh the page or check the API.
admin.invites.confirm.revoke_description: Once revoked, the registration link will stop working and cannot be used to create an account. This action cannot be undone.
admin.invites.generate.title: Generate new invite
admin.invites.generate.description: Pick a role and validity window for the registration link. The token will be shown ONLY ONCE after generation — deliver it out-of-band to the recipient.
admin.invites.token_modal.title: Invite generated for {{role}} role
admin.invites.token_modal.body: The registration link is valid until {{expires_at}}. Copy it now and deliver it out-of-band to the recipient. If you close this modal without copying, you must generate a fresh invite.
admin.invites.errors.invite_not_found: Invite not found. The list may be out of date — refresh and try again.
admin.invites.errors.invite_already_reso: This invite is already used or revoked.
admin.invites.errors.generic: Operation failed. Refresh the page and try again, or check the server logs.
auth.reset_password.title: Set a new password
auth.reset_password.error.token_invalid: This reset link is invalid, has expired, or has already been used. Ask the administrator for a fresh link.
auth.reset_password.error.token_missing: This page requires a reset link. Ask the administrator for one.
auth.reset_password.error.unexpected: Could not reset your password. Try again in a moment.
auth.login.reset_success_banner: Your password has been reset. Sign in with your new password.
auth.register.title: Create account
auth.register.error.token_invalid: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Ask the administrator for a fresh invite.
auth.register.error.token_consumed: This invite has already been used or was revoked. Ask the administrator for a fresh invite.
auth.register.error.token_missing: This page requires an invite link. Ask the administrator for one.
auth.register.error.email_taken: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
auth.register.error.validation_failed: Validation failed — check your email and password format.
auth.register.error.unexpected: Could not create your account. Try again in a moment.
auth.register.display_name_hint: How your account appears to others. You can change this later in settings.
settings.hub.title: Settings
settings.hub.description: Manage your profile, two-factor authentication, and active sessions.
settings.hub.profile.card_description: Edit your display name. Email and role are managed by the administrator.
settings.hub.2fa.card_description: Add a one-time code from an authenticator app to your sign-in.
settings.hub.sessions.card_description: Review devices currently signed in to your account and revoke any you don't recognise.
settings.profile.title: Profile
settings.profile.description: Edit your display name. Email and role are managed by the administrator.
settings.profile.display_name_hint: How your account appears to other users in the portal (1–120 characters).
settings.profile.error.blank: Display name must not be blank.
settings.profile.error.too_long: Display name must be 120 characters or fewer.
settings.profile.error.unexpected: Could not save. Try again in a moment.
catalog.title: Model catalog
catalog.emptyPage: This page is past the end of the list.
catalog.filters.title: Filters
catalog.deleteDialog.title: Delete model
catalog.deleteDialog.description: This soft-deletes the model. Type the name to confirm.
catalog.actions.checkedHelp: Checked STLs feed Re-render. Click to regenerate the preview now.
catalog.actions.dropOrBrowse: + Drop photos here, or click to browse
share.title: Shared model
viewer3d.hint: Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom · Right-drag to pan
viewer3d.confirm_large.title: This file is large
viewer3d.confirm_large.body: {{size}} MB STL — loading may take a moment. Continue?
viewer3d.parse_error: Could not parse STL — file may be corrupt
viewer3d.measure.label: {{value}} mm
viewer3d.measure.summary_empty: No measurements yet. Click two points on the model.
viewer3d.measure.tolerance.label: Plane tolerance
viewer3d.measure.tolerance.help: Larger values accept more triangles as coplanar.
viewer3d.measure.diameter.weak_tooltip: Diameter is approximate — the selected loop deviates from a perfect circle.
viewer3d.measure.tolerance.disabled_reas: Tolerance applies only to plane modes
viewer3d.file_selector.label: File
share.dialog.title: Share link
share.dialog.description: Generate a public link to {{model}}. Anyone with the link can view the model — no login required.
share.dialog.notice_anonymous_readonly: Recipients see the model in read-only mode (no admin actions, no edit). The link expires automatically.
share.dialog.notice_share_oob: Copy and send via Slack, email, or SMS. The link works for anyone — no login required.
share.dialog.errors.create_failed: Could not generate link — please try again.
share.dialog.errors.copy_failed: Copy failed — please select and copy manually.
share.view.signin_aria: Sign in to access more options
share.member_context.banner: You opened this model from a shared link.
share.view.stl_description: Download the STL to print or open in your slicer.
share.view.footer_anonymous_notice: This is a shared link — your view is anonymous and read-only.
share.view.not_found_description: This share link does not exist, has expired, or was revoked.
share.view.error_description: Something went wrong loading this model. Please try again later.
settings.hub.share_links.card_descriptio: List and revoke share links you've generated.
settings.share_links.title: My share links
settings.share_links.description: Share links you've generated. Revoking a link immediately disconnects anonymous viewers.
settings.share_links.empty: You haven't generated any share links.
settings.share_links.load_failed: Could not load share links — please refresh.
settings.share_links.revoke_failed: Could not revoke — please try again.
admin.models.new.title: Add a model
admin.models.new.description: Create a model row manually. Add files (STL/STEP/3MF, images) on the model detail page after create.
admin.models.new.files_note: After create you'll be redirected to the detail page where you can upload STL, source, and image files.
admin.models.new.errors.slug_conflict: A model with this slug already exists. Please choose a different name.
admin.models.new.errors.validation: Some fields did not validate. Please review the form.
admin.models.new.errors.generic: Could not create — please try again.
admin.models.new.errors.description_crea: Model created but description note failed to save. Add it from the detail page.
catalog.description.bilingual_hint: Fill both languages when possible — the catalog renders the locale-matching version with the other as fallback.

modules.spools.lowstock.all_ok: Every spool is above the threshold.

modules.estimates.states.stale_banner: Estimate may be out of date.

modules.estimates.failure.parse_failure: The slicer output couldn't be parsed.
modules.estimates.failure.missing_metada: The slicer output was missing the estimate summary.
modules.estimates.failure.unparseable_ti: The print time couldn't be read from the slicer output.
modules.estimates.failure.unparseable_nu: A filament value couldn't be read from the slicer output.

modules.estimates.chip.no_hash: No estimate available for this file.

modules.admin.profiles.title: Process profiles
modules.admin.profiles.legend.title: Legend
modules.admin.profiles.legend.not_resolv: Installed but fails to resolve — needs attention
modules.admin.profiles.legend.incompatib: Structurally not valid for this material
modules.admin.profiles.provenance.label: Provenance
modules.admin.profiles.import.choose_fil: Choose a profile JSON file to import
modules.admin.profiles.import.error.inva: That file isn't a valid profile triple
modules.admin.profiles.import.error.unsu: No profile base for this material
modules.admin.profiles.import.error.miss: References a system profile that isn't installed
modules.admin.profiles.import.error.too_: That file is too large to be a profile
modules.admin.profiles.import.error.gene: Import failed — check the file and try again
modules.admin.profiles.empty_hint: No profiles imported yet — import one to offer it to members
modules.admin.profileLibrary.title: Profile library
modules.admin.profileLibrary.description: Imported Orca profile blocks (process, filament, machine). Curated metadata only — never raw Orca JSON.
modules.admin.profileLibrary.upload.choo: Choose an Orca profile-block JSON file to import
modules.admin.profileLibrary.reason.unsu: Couldn't classify this Orca profile block
modules.admin.profileLibrary.reason.too_: That file is too large to be a profile block
modules.admin.profileLibrary.reason.unkn: Its inherited parent isn't in the system tree
modules.admin.profileLibrary.reason.user: A user process must inherit a system process — this one doesn't
modules.admin.profileLibrary.reason.gene: Operation failed — check the file and try again
modules.admin.profileLibrary.delete.conf: This removes the imported block from the library. It does not affect the slot grid.
modules.admin.profileLibrary.empty: No profile blocks imported yet — import one to start the library.
modules.admin.profileOffers.title: Profile offers
modules.admin.profileOffers.description: Validated machine + process + filament chains over the block library. Not ordering, not slicing — members still use the current selector.
modules.admin.profileOffers.field.block_: This block no longer exists in the library
modules.admin.profileOffers.form.default: A default that is hidden won't be offered; two visible defaults for one material category conflict.
modules.admin.profileOffers.form.chain_i: To change the selected blocks, delete this offer and compose a new one.
modules.admin.profileOffers.delete.confi: This removes only the offer. The referenced library blocks are not touched.
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.unkno: A selected block no longer exists in the library
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.wrong: A selected block is the wrong type for its slot
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.block: A selected block can't be used
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.filam: This filament isn't declared compatible with this machine
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.mater: The filament's material isn't in this offer's categories
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.defau: This offer is marked default but hidden — it won't be offered
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.dupli: Another visible offer is already the default for this material category
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.inval: The selected blocks don't form a valid chain
modules.admin.profileOffers.reason.gener: Operation failed — check the details and try again
modules.admin.profileOffers.recompute.ti: Recompute estimates for all STL files (current offers)
modules.admin.profileOffers.recompute.de: Offer-driven maintenance for the member-facing, visible offers. Inspect first, then explicitly enqueue missing or stale slicer estimate jobs.
modules.admin.profileOffers.recompute.co: Would enqueue is the dry-run estimate; Enqueued is the confirmed-run result.
Run estimate recompute for current offers?
This queues slicer jobs for visible published offers only. The operation is idempotent and skips fresh estimates.
modules.admin.profileOffers.empty: No offers composed yet — compose one to validate a machine + process + filament chain.
modules.admin.queues.title: Worker queues
modules.admin.queues.description: Read-only live view of the three ARQ worker pools — queued/running counts, worker liveness, and recent results (~last hour, Redis-resident).
modules.admin.queues.retention: ~last 1h, Redis-resident — a vanished entry expired, it was not resolved.
modules.admin.tagGroups.title: Tag groups
modules.admin.tagGroups.description: Read-only view of facet tag groups, their tags, and per-tag model counts.
modules.admin.tagGroups.rename.descripti: Edit the display names. The slug identifier stays unchanged.
modules.admin.tagGroups.move.title: Move tag
modules.admin.tagGroups.merge.title: Merge tag
modules.admin.tagGroups.merge.warning: “{{name}}” will be permanently deleted and its models reassigned to the survivor.
modules.admin.tagGroups.create.title: Create group
modules.admin.tagGroups.create.descripti: Create a new empty facet group. The slug is a permanent identifier.
modules.admin.tagGroups.errors.conflict: That name or slug is already in use.
modules.admin.tagGroups.errors.group_not: The selected group no longer exists.
modules.admin.tagGroups.errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
modules.admin.tagGroups.duplicates.title: Possible duplicates
modules.admin.tagGroups.duplicates.dialo: Choose which tag survives. The others in this cluster will be merged into it.
The other tags in this cluster will be permanently deleted and their models reassigned to the survivor.
modules.admin.tagGroups.duplicates.toast: Some duplicate tags couldn't be merged. Already-merged tags were kept.
modules.member.offers.picker.heading: Published profiles
modules.member.offers.estimate.not_compu: The estimate for this file with the selected profile hasn't been computed yet.
modules.member.offers.estimate.offer_una: The selected print profile is no longer published.
modules.admin.offers.republish.error: Republish failed — check the server logs and try again.
modules.admin.offers.republish.missing_s: No published STL hash is available; select an STL before republishing.
